metadata.source: geoBoundaries SLE-ADM2 (commit 9469f09) + OSM relation 9641203 (Karene) + GADM 4.1 (chiefdom-level splits)
metadata.note: 16 districts. 12 districts: geoBoundaries SLE-ADM2 (commit 9469f09). Karene: OSM relation 9641203 (authoritative 2017 boundary). Bombali/Port Loko: GADM 4.1 chiefdoms minus chiefdoms transferred to Karene. Falaba/Koinadugu: GADM 4.1 chiefdoms (Falaba=Diang+Mongo+Neya+Sengbe). All new boundaries Douglas-Peucker simplified at eps=0.003°.

properties.note: Boundary from geoBoundaries SLE-ADM2 (commit 9469f09), clipped to exclude 2017 split district
